name: recover-real-objective
triggers: Request names a knob or parameter change instead of an outcome (increase/bump/set the timeout, limit, retries, threshold, buffer, workers)
Vague referent with no stated goal (fix it, improve this, clean up that, optimize it, speed it up)
Oddly specific micro-instruction with missing context (just change/add/set/remove X)
A draft executes the literal request without stating what objective the change serves
counterindications: Request already carries its objective (so that / because / the goal is / acceptance criteria stated)
Task is a one-step factual lookup with no optimization target
